scripts.docker:start: echo '🐳 Starting EPG docker service...' && docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml up -d
scripts.dev:channels: echo '📺 Generating channels.xml...' && npm run generate:channels
scripts.dev:docker: docker info > /dev/null 2>&1 || open -a Docker; sleep 5 && npm run docker:start
scripts.dev:warm: echo '🔥 Warming cache...' && npm run warm
scripts.dev: npm run dev:channels && npm run dev:docker && npm run dev:warm && npm run dev:server
